freshness.details: Dataset delivered within 12 minutes of expected schedule.

validity.details: One record contained zero-value order amount and was flagged.

consistency.details: Minor mismatch observed in regional order classification conventions.

issues_detected.description: One row violated the greater_than_zero rule for order_amount.

recommendations: Introduce upstream validation on order_amount before ingestion.
Track repeated zero-value transaction anomalies over 7-day windows.
